summary: Fixed critical runtime ReferenceError ('light is not defined' in RevealStage) that blocked iteration_53 retest, then validated both the light-mode reveal line and the new horizontal Pub-Crawl award card. All 4 requested tests now pass with zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: RevealStage was called with `light={light}` prop from Home render but the function signature did not destructure `light`, causing an Uncaught ReferenceError on every render — full page crashed in light mode. Root cause of iteration_53 failure. FIXED by adding `light` to the RevealStage destructured props (Home.jsx line 1555). Recommend the main agent audit other recently-added prop passes for similar destructuring omissions.
Home.jsx is 1700+ lines; the RevealStage/ShufflingDeck components should be split into their own files to reduce this class of bug and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: None. Used exactly 2 Places-consuming actions as instructed (1 spin at ZIP 90210, 1 crawl-deal at ZIP 90210).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Iteration_53 failed because RevealStage missed `light` destructure -> React crash overlay in light mode masked the actual reveal-line assertion. After the one-line fix, all validations pass:

1) LIGHT reveal-line RETEST: Toggled light mode via localStorage ff_theme='light' + skipped guided intro via ff_guided_seen='1'. Entered ZIP 90210, clicked spin-roulette-button. reaper-line innerText = 'Bon appétit — go enjoy.' — matches LIGHT_LINES set. PASS.

2) Crawl award (light mode) — HORIZONTAL card: crawl-mode-toggle -> crawl-zip-a=90210 -> crawl-deal-button. pub-crawl-dialog opened with 6 stops. Checked all 6 via crawl-checkoff-{0..5}. crawl-badge-dialog opened automatically. After cinematic reveal (~1.4s in light mode), clicked crawl-badge-skip-selfie. crawl-badge-preview bbox = 520×292.5 px, aspect ratio 1.78 (== 16:9), HORIZONTAL=true. Preview text confirmed: 'Fork·Fate / PUB CRAWL / CONGRATULATIONS / THE FORK·FATE / PUB CRAWL / Your name / fork-fate.com' — logo (left) + congrats (middle) + selfie box (right) all present. PASS.

3) Download button: crawl-badge-download-button present; clicking it triggered client-side canvas download with 0 new console errors. PASS.

4) Dark-mode regression: Toggled theme back; reaper-bg element re-appears, no console errors. PASS.

Total console errors across whole run: 0.
rca of the issue: Iteration_53 failing 'reveal-line' test — ROOT CAUSE: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx, the RevealStage function signature omitted `light` from destructured props even though the JSX at line 1062 was passing `light={light}`. React DEV mode threw 'ReferenceError: light is not defined' inside RevealStage on first render, mounting the error-overlay div that hid the entire app; the spin-result-card never rendered and the previous testing agent could not observe the reveal-line. Fix: added `light` to the RevealStage destructured parameter list. Reproduction: set localStorage ff_theme='light', reload — before fix: red 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay. After fix: normal light-mode UI renders and spin flow completes.
